mapper.select: SELECT mno, mid, mpw, email, del, social, grade, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(deldate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS delDate FROM member WHERE mid = #{mid}
SELECT mno, mid, mpw, email, del, social, grade, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(deldate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS delDate FROM member WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT mno, mid, mpw, email, del, social, grade, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(deldate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS delDate FROM member WHERE mid = #{keyword} OR email = #{keyword}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( mid, mpw, email, del, social, grade ) VALUES ( #{mid}, #{mpw}, #{email}, #{del}, #{social}, #{grade} )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET mpw = #{mpw}, email = #{email}, del = 0, social = #{social}, grade = #{grade}, regdate = NOW(), deldate = NULL WHERE mid = #{mid}
UPDATE member SET mid = CONCAT(mid, '_del_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()) WHERE mid = #{mid} AND del = 1
UPDATE member SET email = CONCAT(email, '_del_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()) WHERE email = #{email} AND del = 1
mapper.select: SELECT mno, mid, mpw, email, del, social, grade, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(deldate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS delDate FROM member ORDER BY mno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET del = 1, deldate = NOW(), mid = CONCAT(mid, '_del_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()), email = IF(email IS NOT NULL AND email != '', CONCAT(email, '_del_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()), email) WHERE mid = #{mid}
